title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 17 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 17 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 17 2026
summary:
Main
The DCE iron ore futures continued to decline today, with the benchmark I2609 contract finally closingat 747.5 yuan/ton, down 2.61% from the previous session and extending losses markedly. Portside spot prices also fell in tandem, dropping 10-15 yuan/ton from a day earlier. Traders showed diverging approaches-some refrained from quoting and stood on the sidelines, while others offered cargoes in line with market conditions; steel mills remained cautious, with strong intentions to push prices down and a slower procurement pace, dampening overall market sentiment.
